lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. What are you up to?

lines.speaker: Lisse Isaakson
lines.text: Ah, I was about to collect some yak's milk to make yak cheese.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Eughr! Though I am curious. Can I try some?

lines.speaker: Lisse Isaakson
lines.text: Sorry, no. The last outlander who ate my cheese was ill for a month.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So why don't you get ill as well?

lines.speaker: Lisse Isaakson
lines.text: Well, we eat yak milk products every day, from when we're born. So I suppose we're used to it. Anyway I should stop yakking - haha - and get on with my work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm glad to see that puns are common everywhere in Gielinor; even here.

lines.speaker: Lisse Isaakson
lines.text: I need your help with this!
